name: COI_Folmer_Annelida
description: Animal mitochondrial COI Folmer barcode region (~658 bp, positions ~58-715 of the mitochondrial cox1 gene) for taxonomic group Annelida. Earthworms, polychaetes. Sequenced with LCO1490/HCO2198 (Folmer 1994); the universal animal DNA barcode. Allow high mismatch for cross-species discrimination.
